name: player_pff_offense range year_offset averages the grade window
description: PFF offense grade is a 0-100 rating; a range year_offset reduces with AVG, not the SUM default.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT AVG(pff_player_seasonlogs.offense) FROM pff_player_seasonlogs WHERE pff_player_seasonlogs.pid = player.pid AND pff_player_seasonlogs.year IN (2024,2025)) AS "pff_offense_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
